PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-03-2018 Continued To Jul-31-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Qi Li Zhou, petitioner, in propria persona (with spouse, Bo Man Tam)
Karen Zhou, petitioner, in propria persona (with spouse, name not provided)

Mr. Tam stated that decedent had half interest of property with Qi Li Zhou, and the home was common tenant, not joint tenant. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to July 31, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for petitioners to obtain counsel.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
